headline: Automation takes center stage at Smurfit Westrock ‘superplant’ in Wisconsin
summary: From pizza to industrial products, there’s a corrugated box for that at the year-old, $136 million Pleasant Prairie plant. Automation lets it use about 60% of the labor of a traditional box plant, while scale enables service to greater Chicago.
